query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| if (user_agent matches "*Windows *" OR user_agent matches "*Win32*" OR user_agent matches "*Win64*","Windows","") as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "*Macintosh*" OR user_agent matches "*Darwin/*" OR user_agent matches "*Mac OS*","MacOS",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "* CrOS *","Chrome OS",OS) as OS
| if (user_agent matches "*Linux*","Linux",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "*iPad*","iPad",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "*iPhone*","iPhone",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "*Android*","Android",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "*Windows Phone*","Windows Phone",OS) as OS 
| if (OS == "","Other",OS) as OS 
| if (user_agent matches "Mozilla/*; rv:*)*","Mozilla","") as Browser
| if (user_agent matches "*MSIE*","Internet Explorer",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "*Firefox*","Firefox",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "*Safari*","Safari",Browser) as Browser 
| if (OS=="Android" AND user_agent matches "*WebKit*","WebKit",Browser) as Browser
| if ((OS=="iPhone" OR OS=="iPad") AND (user_agent matches "*Mobile/*" OR user_agent matches "*AppleWebKit*(KHTML*Gecko)*"),"Mobile Safari",Browser) as Browser
| if (browser == "" AND OS=="MacOS" AND user_agent matches "Mozilla/* (Macintosh;*(KHTML, like Gecko)*","Safari",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "*MobileSafari/*","Mobile Safari",Browser) as Browser
| if (user_agent matches "*Chrome*","Chrome",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "Opera*","Opera",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "Dolphin*","Dolphin",Browser) as Browser 
| if (Browser == "","Other",Browser) as Browser  
| count by OS,browser
| transpose row Browser column OS

sources.dashboardDescription: The Nginx - Visitor Access Types Dashboard provides insights into visitor platform types, browsers, and operating systems, as well as the most popular mobile devices, PC and Mac versions used.
